title: BLOCK 2 endpoint: 30-lesson milestone
description: Closing 30 lessons — combined paragraph with all letters, punctuation, and numbers
text: today, 25 may 2026, marks 30 lessons completed. you've learned 26 letters, 10 digits, and 9 punctuation marks; that's the foundation. next: symbols, speed, and real-world practice. you've earned it!

tips.text: Thirty lessons, and here's the proof: 200 characters that ask for everything at once.
Every letter, every digit, every mark you've trained. Set them down cleanly.

tips.text: Hold 30 WPM here and Block 3 is yours - symbols and speed next. You earned the page; turn it. - Eleanor Hayes, editor

tips.target: 9 punctuation marks; that's the foundation. next: symbols, speed, and real-world practice. you've earned it!

character_tips.anna: Thirty lessons in. The hands have stopped hunting and started knowing. That's fluency taking hold.
character_tips.maxim: Twenty-six letters, ten digits, the full run of punctuation - all under control. Symbols come next.
character_tips.knopych: A clean checkpoint at thirty. No fanfare needed; the work speaks.
character_tips.klavochka: Thirty lessons, and steady ones. Look how far the page has carried you.
